name: dialog
title: Dialog
description: Center modal with scrim, focus trap, Escape to close, and scroll lock.

api.description: Center modal with scrim, focus trap, Escape to close, and body scroll lock. Use for instructional or confirmational content that should interrupt the page.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when open state should change.

props.name: children
props.description: Compose with DialogTrigger, DialogContent, and the header, body, and footer parts.

props.name: render
props.description: Optional host element. Merge trigger props onto a kit Button or other control.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger label when rendering the default button.

props.name: children
props.description: Panel contents. Prefer DialogHeader, DialogBody, and DialogFooter.

props.name: showClose
props.description: Show the trailing close control in the header.

props.name: children
props.description: Accessible dialog title. Wired to aria-labelledby.

props.name: children
props.description: Supporting copy under the title. Wired to aria-describedby.

props.name: children
props.description: Actions aligned to the end of the panel.

props.name: render
props.description: Optional host element. Merge close props onto a kit Button.

props.name: children
props.description: Close control label when rendering the default button.
